nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 红翅歌百灵
nodes.summary: 红翅歌百灵（Red-winged lark，学名 Corypha (bird) hypermetra），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于安东·赖歇诺，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 安东·赖歇诺
nodes.summary: 安东·赖歇诺是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联27种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Striped flufftail、烏干達點啄木等27种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The red-winged lark (Corypha hypermetra) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in eastern Africa

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It occurs within Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, South Sudan, Tanzania and Uganda, and its estimated global extent of occurrence is 660,000 km2. Its total population has yet to be quantified, but is believed to be large. Its natural habitat is savanna in tropical to subtropical dry, open, lowland
